description: Generate a database seed file that inserts test records into a Drizzle table
next_steps: Run `npx tsx db/seed/{{name}}.ts` to seed your database
Add it to your `package.json` scripts: `"seed:{{name}}": "tsx db/seed/{{name}}.ts"`

name.description: Table/entity name that matches the schema file (e.g. 'users', 'products')

count.description: Number of seed records to generate
